name: Arthur Rimbaud / Paul Verlaine.
description:
He doesn't remember you

(POV!Verlaine).

────୨ৎ────

After the explosion in Suribachi City, Rimbaud lost all his memories. You play as Verlaine.

!?! Possible spoilers ?!?

[ I tried to make this bot as canon as possible and everything up until the moment of explosion goes according to canon. Perhaps this is one of the reasons why I did not put the "mlm" tag, but if you want them to have a romantic branch - just mention it to the bot or save it in the chat memory. ]

Timeframe.

This is before the events of "Dazai, Chuya, Age Fifteen", and of course before "Storm Bringer", but after the explosion of Arahabaki and Verlaine's betrayal. Mori has already become the new boss and made Rimbaud Sub-Executive. Verlaine is in hiding at this time and is presumed dead.

More information.

➤ I don't even know what to add. This is really as close to canon as possible and I hope he doesn't act weird because of the complex concepts of this universe. I had to tinker with the bot, but I love these two too much so I'm just happy I did it.

➤ rimlaine this is my hysteria, so enjoy.

Recommendations for using the bot.

╰┈➤ For higher quality answers, I recommend you use the chat memory.

You can enter the following characteristics there: current relationships (strangers, friends, enemies, etc.); current location and seasons; basic facts about the characters that you want him to remember; as well as other important moments for the story.

Also, if you haven't done so yet, set up your Persona. Honestly, I would recommend creating a separate persona for this bot, since it doesn't know what Verlaine looks like.

╰┈➤ Generation Settings.

Temperature: 1.1 to 1.4 (on average, it's better to set 1.2-1.25).

Max new tokens: 0.

╰┈➤ LLM issues.

These are issues caused by the platform's features, which in most cases do not depend on the bot's coding. These are complaints such as: the bot speaks for {{user}}, repetitions, too fast NSFW, the speech is like from a collection of poetry, continues role-playing for {{user}}, poor memory.

Try regenerating the message or describing your request more precisely. He has a jailbreak that prohibits description of actions on behalf of the {{user}}.

Create a chat!

|ω・)و✧
creator: enmt
